_comment: Minimal momentum_v1 trade spec for `helios test-proof`. Field set mirrors reference-strategies/momentum_v1/src/momentum_v1/witness.py (see operator-guide.md §4). The prover service completes oracle_root + trade_hash via circomlibjs Poseidon; the rest of the witness is supplied here. price_observations is a 16-bar monotonic up-trend so the momentum signal triggers cleanly.
